productDisplayName: Kelme Women Green Dalila Casual Shoes
description: Style noteSpanish flamboyance - kelme Pasion - now in India, here on myntra! Soft fabric upper with plush nubuck overlays and an unbelievably cushiony sockliner brought together in a firm masculine structure, albeit with feminine design. This versatile shoe can be worn with casual sport style ensembles, or as a quirky throw-in with dressier pieces! Comes with a spare set of laces.Product DetailsRound toed forest green shoe with nubuck overlays, wing tip styling at the toe and lace-up fasteningSoft foamy rubber midsole with a removable, padded socklinerTPU outsole with branded grooves all over, reinforced onto the upper at the heelMaterial and CareFabric, nubuckDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
